query: Run harness-doc-review with scope recipes and return JSON only.
expected_skill_contribution: Structured JSON CI documentation review wrapping doc-review.
expected_behavior: Declares Harness-doc-review scope as first visible output.
Returns JSON object with verdict summary findings recipe_validation and memory_checkpoint.
